g.text: - Generate SRT/LRC/MD subtitles and transcripts from audio/video files.
-h, --help show this help message and exit
--version show program's version number and exit
-i, --input DIR Input directory containing audio/video files
Output format: srt, lrc, or md
-l, --language CODE Language code, e.g. zh, en, ja. Use
--download Download the model specified by -e and -m, then exit
--download-all Download all known models for the engine specified by
--list-ollama-models List installed Ollama models from the server
--auto-correct Auto-correct typos, wrong characters, and verbal
--polish-nlp Polish subtitles using NLP sentence segmentation
--api-key KEY API key for OpenAI-compatible service
--api-model NAME Model name for OpenAI-compatible API
--target-lang CODES Comma-separated target language codes for translation,
Seconds between keyframe extractions for video
